title: Night Shelter Transformation Fund: Round 2 prospectus
body: "Night Shelter Transformation Fund - Round 2 is available to small to medium sized night shelter providers from the faith and community sector, to provide a diverse range of quality, dignified provision for individuals experiencing rough sleeping, offering more sustainable routes off the streets.  Funding will be provided for both:   Enhancing or developing single room accommodation for people experiencing rough sleeping. Developing non-residential support for people experiencing rough sleeping where applicants can demonstrate a specific need and targeted solution that enhances local areas’ existing support and reduces the number of people experiencing rough sleeping.   For further information about this funding and the application process, please view the prospectus document above.  The fund FAQs in the prospectus will be updated weekly. We recommend applicants view this first if you have any questions about the fund or the application process. "
